introSection:
Tron Lightcycle Run (stylized as TRON Lightcycle / Run) is a steel motorbike roller coaster currently operating at the Magic Kingdom in Lake Buena Vista, Florida, USA.

It is located behind Space Mountain in Tomorrowland and opened in 2023.

sections.title: History
sections.content: On August 30, 2025, Disney announced starting September 15 that the ride would have a temporary overlay in conjunction with the upcoming movie TRON: Ares. The overlay would include red lighting and sounds from the film's soundtrack.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a near clone of the pre-existing Tron ride that opened in 2016 at Shanghai Disneyland in China.

sections.title: Station
sections.content: Tron Lightcycle Run has separate areas for loading and unloading.

fullText:
Tron Lightcycle Run (stylized as TRON Lightcycle / Run) is a steel motorbike roller coaster currently operating at the Magic Kingdom in Lake Buena Vista, Florida, USA.

It is located behind Space Mountain in Tomorrowland and opened in 2023.

On August 30, 2025, Disney announced starting September 15 that the ride would have a temporary overlay in conjunction with the upcoming movie TRON: Ares. The overlay would include red lighting and sounds from the film's soundtrack.

The ride is a near clone of the pre-existing Tron ride that opened in 2016 at Shanghai Disneyland in China.

Tron Lightcycle Run has separate areas for loading and unloading.
